steps.title: Spot the contrast signal
steps.content: ”Despite” sets up a contrast: the first clause criticizes Mandela's presidency for insufficient structural change, so the blank must show something that opposes this criticism.

steps.title: Match the answer
steps.content:
”Lauded” (praised or celebrated) directly opposes the criticism—his continued global praise contradicts the local critique about his presidency.
The other choices don't form this opposition: “evaluated” is neutral, “reinterpreted” is too vague, and “criticized” reinforces the criticism.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
